hero_subtitle: SFTY structures KYC provider outputs into audit-ready evidence packages while automating risk-based routing, case handling and regulatory rule updates within one unified workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYC evidence remains scattered and incomplete
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to consolidate KYC provider checks and internal review notes into a unified evidence package. This fragmentation slows onboarding, complicates audit readiness, and weakens the defensibility of compliance decisions for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies provider checks, reviewer notes and internal decisions into one structured workflow that generates complete, audit-ready evidence packages for faster and more defensible KYC reviews.
workflow_title: From provider checks to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY moves KYC and KYB provider outputs through rule-based routing, case creation, manual review and evidence preservation within a structured compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions and evidence that compliance teams can rely on for audit-ready KYC review and reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in managing provider outputs, preserving audit-ready KYC evidence, and enabling clear due diligence within enterprise-grade deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support KYC evidence collection workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC provider outputs become audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how compliance cases preserve provider check details
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how risk-based routing improves KYC review processes
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYC evidence collection?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYC provider outputs into a structured workflow that automates review, routing, case creation and evidence collection for regulated digital asset compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate KYC review workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal rules to route reviews, open cases, assign tasks and record decisions, creating a controlled and auditable KYC process that reduces manual work.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYC evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case notes and provider results as audit-ready evidence packages to support compliance reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with multiple KYC, KYB and screening providers to connect their outputs within one compliance operating layer without disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or onboarding providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC and onboarding providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Structure KYC evidence into audit-ready cases
final_description: See how SFTY connects KYC provider outputs with risk routing, case workflows and regulatory rule updates for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
